arts.ttl: Why Man City see themselves in Real Madrid as they bid to keep season alive
arts.sum: European giants clash tonight at the Etihad in a potentially defining game

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Manchester City – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid make the familiar trip to Manchester this evening to take on Manchester City in the Champions League. For the fourth consecutive campaign, the Spaniards face the Premier League champions in Europe. Last season, Real Madrid triumphed on penalties to progress on route to a record-extending 15th Champions League crown. arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Real Madrid – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City welcome Real Madrid to the Etihad in a huge Champions League clash tonight. After each missing out on automatic qualification for the Round of 16, the European heavyweights collide in a two-legged play-off tie. arts.ttl: Man City and Real Madrid got what they wanted but now face new Champions League playoff problem
arts.sum: The world is not enough for the two superpowers, who have dominated European football for the past half-decade but still insist on trying to bend everything to their will via legal challenges

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Real Madrid – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City host Champions League holders Real Madrid in the first leg of their playoff tie tonight. The team that prevails over two legs will earn a spot in the last 16 of the competition with the losers eliminated. arts.ttl: Ancelotti: Whoever wins our play-off with City will win Champions League
arts.sum: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti has laid down a marker to their Champions League rivals by saying whoever wins their play-off tie with Manchester City will lift the trophy in May.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham Breaks La Liga Rule in Every Real Madrid Game
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham is breaking a little-known rule in every La Liga game he plays, but he hasn't been punished for his actions yet.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star responds to WORLD RECORD Real Madrid offer
arts.sum: During Arsenal's recent trip to Dubai, a Gunners fan begged Saliba not to join Real Madrid this summer. Real Madrid have reportedly made a record-breaking move for William Saliba, and the Arsenal star defender has not ruled out a transfer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star is keen on leaving with Real Madrid named as his ‘dream’ club
arts.sum: One of Arsenal’s best players is attracting interest from Real Madrid with the player open to a move to the La Liga champions. The Gunners have challenged for the Premier League title for the last two seasons but on both occasions, they have lost out to Pep Guardiola’s Manchester City side.
